title: picris hieracioides var. squarrosa
intro: Picris hieracioides var. squarrosa, also known as Rough Hawksbeard, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family and is characterized by its jagged, toothed leaves and small yellow flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve digestive issues such as bloating and indigestion. The health benefits of Picris hieracioides var. squarrosa include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to support overall digestive health.
